name: Bean Curd with Pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut drained bean curd into small cubes.
2. Drain syrup from the pineapple, retaining 1 tablespoon.
3. Dissolve cornflour in the reserved pineapple syrup.
4. Stir in sherry and soy sauce. Add bean curd and let stand for 15 minutes.
5. Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry the marinated bean curd until the liquid has been absorbed. Remove and drain.
6. Add a little more oil and stir-fry the green onion, bean sprouts, and pineapple for 1 minute.
7. Add bean curd back into the mixture and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
8. Serve with boiled rice.
